rationale: The citing paper’s core mechanism is explicitly “accessibility-based” egocentric anchoring and includes manipulations that make self/other thoughts more accessible, while the cited paper is centered on how incidental cues change product accessibility and downstream evaluations/choices. This construct-level overlap (accessibility/priming as a mechanism source) makes the citation plausibly substantive, and with only DOI-level match evidence (no context snippet) it is not safe to treat as an obvious mention-only reference.
